dialogue.text: ...are lured by the ever- interifying scent...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So stay out of my way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: usoppun!! The island is about to move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
